mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_AI_CHAT (ID, AI_CHAT_CONTENT, AI_CHAT_ROLE, MEMBER_ID) VALUES (SEQ_AI_CHAT.NEXTVAL, #{content}, #{role}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT ID as id, AI_CHAT_CONTENT as aiChatContent, AI_CHAT_ROLE as aiChatRole, AI_CHAT_CREATE_AT as aiChatCreateAt, MEMBER_ID as memberId FROM TBL_AI_CHAT WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY AI_CHAT_CREATE_AT ASC
